name: M.R.M. SA
summary: MRM is a listed real estate investment company that owns and manages a portfolio of retail properties across several regions of France. Its majority shareholder is SCOR SE, which owns 59.9% of share capital. MRM is listed in Compartment C of Euronext Paris (ISIN: FR0000060196 - Bloomberg code: MRM:FP √Ç¬ñ Reuters code: MRM.PA). MRM opted for SIIC status on 1 January 2008.
